• Implemented the handoff in the plan path.

  The main changes are in murder/work/plans/sync.py:182, murder/state/persistence/plans.py:47, murder/state/persistence/schema.py:169, murder/state/persistence/migrations.py:404, murder/app/service/read_model.py:304,
  and murder/app/cli/service_cmd.py:404. Plans are now single-master: reconcile_file ingests from file hash only, there is no plan conflict branch, last_materialized_hash and conflict_reason
  are removed from plan persistence/schema, and the only DB→file write left is missing-file recovery via materialize_row. I also adjusted the plan scaffold call site in murder/
  runtime/orchestration/orchestrator.py:832.

  4 background terminals running · /ps to view · /stop to close
